creator: ek@purplehat.org
text: It seems this is now fetch-able and installable. However, it doesn't appear to be loaded in the list of PEAR's installed packages once it's updated. A "pear list" command doesn't show the HTMLPurifier package and adding the include path to PEAR in PHP (or another source) to the config leaves the HTTP server (Apache, Nginx, LigHTTPd, etc...) missing it. I haven't been able to pinpoint why just yet.
